name: 影分身消散
description: 影分身死亡时不给予击杀充能（已由系统层保障，此规则仅输出消息）
skillCode: var clone = context.rulePiece; if (!clone) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (!context.sourcePiece || context.sourcePiece.instanceId !== clone.instanceId) return { success: false, message: '' }; var attacker = context.targetPiece; if (!attacker) return { success: true, message: clone.name + '消散' }; return { success: true, message: attacker.name + '击杀了影分身（无充能）' };
